overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character walking through the Summonwater Village area. The character traverses shallow water and grassy terrain surrounded by golden autumn trees, with the massive glowing Erdtree visible in the distance against a twilight sky featuring a large crescent moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned village shallow lake with lily pads

events.description: location name 'Summonwater Village' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water surrounded by golden autumn trees and stone ruins

entered.detail: massive glowing golden tree dominating the horizon with bright luminescence
calm shallow lake water with lily pads and reflections of the golden sky
crumbling stone walls and archways of the abandoned village
trees with bright orange and yellow foliage surrounding the water area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shallow waters of Summonwater Village, surrounded by golden autumn trees and ancient stone ruins. The massive glowing Erdtree dominates the distant horizon, backlit by the warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy path through autumn forest with scattered ruins

events.description: character transitions from walking in water to walking on grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy path leaving the shallow water behind, moving toward the Erdtree

entered.detail: narrow dirt and grass trail winding through the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the water onto a grassy dirt path, continuing through the autumn forest. The stone ruins shift to the left as the path curves, and the Erdtree grows larger in the frame as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open trail with massive golden tree and crescent moon view

events.description: large crescent moon becomes visible in the sky to the right of the Erdtree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the grassy path toward the glowing Erdtree with the moon now visible in the twilight sky

entered.detail: massive pale crescent moon hanging in the twilight sky beside the Erdtree

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open trail with the Erdtree glowing brilliantly ahead. The large crescent moon becomes visible in the sky, creating a dramatic backdrop with the golden tree. The stone ruins fade into the distance as the landscape opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene autumn village that gradually opens into a vast landscape dominated by a celestial glow. It begins with the character wading through the shallow waters of Summonwater Village, flanked by golden trees and ancient stone ruins under the warm light of the Erdtree. As the character moves from the water onto a grassy dirt path, the ruins shift to the left and the distant Erdtree grows larger and more imposing in the frame. The scene then expands along an open trail where the stone ruins fade into the distance, allowing the landscape to open up completely. Finally, the camera reveals a dramatic twilight sky where a large crescent moon emerges to frame the brilliantly glowing Erdtree.
